summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned Incident Report page. All 15 features from the test requirements verified successfully. The 5-step form with proper layout, pink Continue button styling, green checkmark checkboxes, and bottom nav hidden behavior all working as expected.
passed_tests: Incident history list view shows 'Incidents' title
Incident history list view shows 'New Incident Report' pink gradient button (from-[#c41b5e] to-[#a01550])
Step 1: Shows 6 incident types (Fall, Medication Issue, Behavioral Change, Injury, Vital Sign Concern, Other)
Step 1: Continue button is dark gray (bg-[#3a3a3c]) when no type selected
Step 1: Continue button is pink (bg-[#ff375f]) when type selected
Step 1: Bottom navigation is hidden when form is open (via CSS style injection)
Step 2: Shows Severity Level buttons (Low, Medium, High, Critical)
Step 2: High severity shows orange ring when selected (ring-2 ring-[#ff9f0a], bg-[#9a4f00])
Step 2: Continue button is dark gray when only severity selected (needs description)
Step 2: Continue button is pink only when severity AND description are filled
Step 3: Shows Witness Information with blue info box (bg-[#1c3a5e])
Step 3: Green checkbox (bg-[#30d158]) when 'No witnesses were present' is checked
Step 4: Shows Add Photos section with dashed border upload area (.border-dashed)
Step 5: Shows Review & Submit with summary card showing type, severity, description, witnesses, photos
Step 5: Notify Family toggle has green checkmark (bg-[#30d158]) when enabled (default on)
Success modal appears after submission with 'Family has been notified' message
Cancel button returns to history view correctly

test_credentials.registration: Create new account via 'Start Free Trial' > 'I'm a Caregiver'

seed_data_creation: None - incidents stored in component state (MOCKED API)

mocked_apis_list: Incidents stored in component state via useState
Data passed via onAddIncident callback prop
No backend API calls for incident storage

context_for_next_testing_agent: Incident Report page fully tested and all 15 required features verified. Key data-testids: new-incident-btn, incident-type-{fall|medication|behavioral|injury|vital|other}, severity-{low|medium|high|critical}, incident-description, incident-actions, incident-witnesses, no-witnesses-checkbox, photo-upload, notify-family-toggle, followup-toggle, incident-continue-btn, incident-back-btn, incident-submit-btn, incident-ok-btn, incident-cancel-btn. The form uses fixed full-screen layout (fixed inset-0 z-40) with CSS injection to hide bottom nav. Continue button correctly switches between bg-[#3a3a3c] (disabled) and bg-[#ff375f] (enabled). Green checkmarks use bg-[#30d158]. High severity uses orange ring (#ff9f0a).

incident_list_view.title: Incidents
incident_list_view.past_reports_section: Shows count badge, lists submitted incidents with severity badges

step_2_severity_details.continue_validation: Requires both severity AND description to enable pink button

step_5_review_submit.title: Review & Submit
step_5_review_submit.summary_card: Shows type, severity badge, description, witnesses, photos count

success_modal.message: Incident report submitted successfully. Family has been notified.

cancel_button.behavior: Returns to history view from any step
